text:
Inzagi (インザギ, Inzagi) was a Chimera Ant Peon Soldier in Welfin's division. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 261 

Appearance

Inzagi had a very wrinkled face with four fangs protruding from his mouth. He had six dots and a pair of antennae on his head. He wore a green long-sleeved shirt with fringes at the bottom and tan pants.

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

While Maenole and Inzagi were on patrol in the East Gorteau's royal palace, they reported an emergency to their superior Welfin, to whom, despises how their voices irritate his ears. At the incident scene, Welfin notes that the blood spilled there belongs to another peon of his named Taragetter, and the shoes left behind belong to someone else. Contemplating how to proceed, Welfin follows the scent trail left by the shoes and has his peons follow suit, though they are missing when the scent trail ends. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 262 

By the time the Extermination Team infiltrates the palace, Maenole, and Inzagi confront Killua, who instinctually kills them with his yo-yos by destroying their heads. Unbeknownst to Killua, their superior, Welfin, witnessed the entire process. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 269 

With the corpses of the peons now mangled, a Chimera Ant on the Extermination Team named Ikalgo (who was in Flutter's corpse) cannot use either of the peons' corpses to manipulate with his Living Dead Dolls Nen ability in the future and he holds Killua to it. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 270 Welfin would indirectly cogitate about the two peons as to why Flutter was spared when he passed by the intruder. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 26, Chapter 271 Hours later, while searching for a new corpse to utilize, Ikalgo encounters the corpses of the peons. However, their bodies are deemed too mangled to use. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 29, Chapter 304 

Abilities & Powers

As a Chimera Ant, Inzagi is already stronger than the average human. He has shown the ability, or at least trait, to be able to release several blade-like weapons from his arms; it's unknown if this is a Nen ability.
